blockingIssues.description: `src/components/visual/SiteAtmosphere.tsx` extends only a static gradient + scanline layer into lower-page and graph/detail states while the real Radiant shader and Hermes ASCII canvas remain hero-only, so the full-shell atmosphere requirement is not actually met.

`src/app/page.tsx` still exposes a primary hero CTA to the legacy `#proof` section anchor instead of a graph destination/focus state, leaving a prominent anchor-scroll path in the supposedly graph-first shell.

`src/components/tokenomics/FeeStackValueFlow.tsx` still shows a 10% social-vault performance fee while the new product-family revenue model and cited source note use 20%, so the tokenomics surface disagrees with itself on user-facing revenue math.

`ScenarioSwitcher` keeps selected scenario and user inputs in local state, and `GraphShell` unmounts inactive surfaces, so tokenomics scenario/input context resets when users leave Tokenomics and come back.

`RoadmapAtlas` keeps `expandedBranches` in local reducer state while `GraphShell` unmounts the roadmap surface off-focus, so multi-branch roadmap exploration state is lost across cross-surface handoffs.

appliedUpdates.description: Added a factual architecture-library note that flywheel node/status data currently lives inline in `src/components/architecture/FlywheelExplorer.tsx`, so consistency tests must render the component instead of importing a shared typed flywheel model.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure-adherence reporting for frontend shell work: when the skill requires a reference-extraction stack or test-first evidence, handoffs should cite the exact tools/tests actually used and workers should mark `followedProcedure=false` if required steps like `pinchtab` usage or named pre-change failing expectations are absent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `graph-shell-logotype-theme-and-atmosphere` marked `followedProcedure=true` without any `pinchtab` usage despite the skill requiring `FetchUrl`, `pinchtab`, and `agent-browser`; `graph-shell-cross-surface-handoffs-and-context` also marked `followedProcedure=true` without naming a newly failing pre-implementation test expectation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit validation checklist item for hero and primary CTA destinations whenever a feature claims to replace section-anchor browsing with graph/node-focused navigation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `graph-shell-navigation-and-node-first-exploration` shipped strong graph-shell tests but still left the hero's primary CTA pointing at `#proof` in `src/app/page.tsx`, which existing validation missed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify/enforce the test-first requirement for content features so workers cannot report `followedProcedure=true` when implementation edits land before the new regression tests they later add.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In `token-policy-recalibration-and-whale-revenue-model`, transcript ordering shows edits to `src/content/token-tiers.ts` before creation of `token-policy-recalibration.test.tsx`, yet the handoff still reported `followedProcedure=true`.
